title: I_am's blood Moon
description: A texture pack that makes the moon red as blood but keeps the craters and stuff
body:
Description

New red moon to add a dark vibe.


This pack changes the moon into an epic red one to upgrade your experience and make you feel like your world is Grandiose and epic.

 

ATTENTION MODPACK CREATORS If you are looking forward to creating a modpack, this resource pack will make the rest of your creation feel big and epic. Combined with a good shader it will make the perfect combo to give the feeling that your world is huge and epic.


Just on the side, I own a server on discord for general gaming and artist that I’m looking forward to grow so feel free to join and chat with some other gamers or artist like you :)

https://discord.gg/UvVffJ633w
